# ZeroTool

> Free online developer tools. No sign-up, no tracking, runs entirely in your browser.

ZeroTool provides 15 browser-based utilities for developers. All tools run client-side — no data leaves your device.

## Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://zerotool.dev/tools/json-formatter): Format, validate, and minify JSON
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://zerotool.dev/tools/base64): Encode or decode Base64 strings
- [UUID Generator](https://zerotool.dev/tools/uuid-generator): Generate UUIDs v1, v4, and v7
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://zerotool.dev/tools/url-encode): Encode or decode URL components
- [Text Case Converter](https://zerotool.dev/tools/text-case): Convert between camelCase, snake_case, UPPER, lower, Title Case
- [Markdown Preview](https://zerotool.dev/tools/markdown-preview): Live Markdown rendering preview
- [Color Converter](https://zerotool.dev/tools/color-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color formats
- [Regex Tester](https://zerotool.dev/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with live matching and highlights
- [Hash Generator](https://zerotool.dev/tools/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 hashes
- [Timestamp Converter](https://zerotool.dev/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates
- [JWT Decoder](https://zerotool.dev/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JWT token header and payload
- [Diff Checker](https://zerotool.dev/tools/diff-checker): Compare two texts side by side with highlighted differences
- [Password Generator](https://zerotool.dev/tools/password-generator): Generate cryptographically strong random passwords
- [QR Code Generator](https://zerotool.dev/tools/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes from text or URLs
- [Cron Expression Parser](https://zerotool.dev/tools/cron-parser): Parse and explain cron schedule expressions

## Blog

- [Blog](https://zerotool.dev/blog): Developer guides and tutorials

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://zerotool.dev/llms-full.txt): Extended version with detailed tool descriptions
